macro.title: America’s housing shortage stems from more than overregulation, Fed report finds
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: San Francisco Home Prices Jump Most in 8 Years Amid AI Boom
macro.what: The median sale price in the Bay Area metro rose 14% year over year in March, compared with a 1% gain nationwide
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Three lessons for mortgage leaders right now
housing.what: Mortgage still repeats old habits, chasing top producers, designing for internal teams, and lagging AI, despite new data and tools.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Portable credit reports spark debate over costs, feasibility
housing.what: While the mortgage industry lobbies to reduce credit report costs, the idea of allowing borrowers to use the same file across multiple lenders has slowly emerged.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.

housing.title: Dark Matter’s Vikas Rao on the nature of shifting mortgage work in the era of AI
housing.what: New CEO Vikas Rao said Dark Matter uses AI across 94% of its work and cut 5% of its staff as automation increases development efficiency.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: U.S. Homeowners Are Remodeling Instead of Relocating
housing.what: About two-thirds of homeowners who recently made renovations chose to upgrade their home instead of moving to a new place, per a recent Redfin survey
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: This Spring’s Housing Market Is Unseasonably Slow As Iran War, High Costs Curb Demand
housing.what: Pending home sales are declining and touring activity is slumping
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Redfin Calls on NWMLS to Give Home Sellers More Choice

housing.title: Over One-Third of American Workers Are Delaying or Canceling Major Purchases Due to Job Security Concerns
housing.what: 7% of American workers are canceling plans to make a major purchase, such as buying a home or car, due to their feelings about job security, according to a Redfin survey
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: RealTrends Verified top performers prove there’s no one way to scale
notables.what: Keller Williams led 2025 with 837,323 sides and $383.086B, while Sotheby’s posted $140.316B volume, per RealTrends data.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Real estate tech shifting from Swiss Army knives to scalpels
notables.what: A growing number of agents, teams and brokerages are abandoning general-purpose tools in favor of highly specialized solutions.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Tri Pointe Homes shareholders approve merger with Sumitomo Forestry
notables.what: Tri Pointe shareholders approved the $4.5 billion all-cash deal with Sumitomo Forestry, with 99.99% of votes in favor.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: HOA liens climb 8.6% nationwide in 2025, with Sun Belt states feeling the most heat
notables.what: HOA lien filings rose 8.6% in 2025 to nearly 285,000 nationwide, with Florida leading in volume and Louisiana and Colorado driving increases.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Maine becomes first state to impose consumer safeguards on home equity investments
notables.what: Maine enacts the first state law regulating HEIs, adding disclosures, counseling and assignee liability for shared appreciation deals.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
